name: superpowers
description: An agentic skills framework with Compound Engineering knowledge capture, session history search, and specialized agent prompts.

interface.shortDescription: Superpowers workflows plus Compound Engineering knowledge capture
interface.longDescription: Use Superpowers to guide agent work through brainstorming, planning, TDD, debugging, verification, and delivery, with Compound Engineering agents plus ce-compound and ce-sessions skills for preserving reusable project knowledge and searching prior session history.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
Let's add a feature to this project.
